arguments.summary: Created requestLogger middleware that wraps res.end to capture response metrics. Logs method, path, status code, response time. Accepts custom log handler. Exported from index.ts, TypeScript compiles.
arguments.final_answer:
Created src/middleware/logger.ts with requestLogger middleware:
- Wraps res.end to capture response time and status code
- LogEntry interface: method, path, statusCode, responseTimeMs, timestamp
- Accepts custom LogHandler or defaults to console.log
- Exported from index.ts, TypeScript compiles cleanly
